title: rosa stylosa f. fastigiata
intro: Rosa stylosa f. fastigiata, also known as the upright or fastigiate rose, is a variety of shrub rose that belongs to the family Rosaceae and is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa stylosa f. fastigiata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a useful herbal remedy for various ailments. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to treat conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
